info.title: VolcAshDB RESTful API - Complete Documentation
info.description: Complete RESTful API documentation for all resources with standard HTTP methods and proper resource naming

tags.name: volcanoes
tags.description: Volcanoes RESTful endpoints - Volcano data and related operations

tags.name: eruptions
tags.description: Eruptions RESTful endpoints - Eruption data and related operations

tags.name: samples
tags.description: Samples RESTful endpoints - Sample data and related operations

tags.name: particles
tags.description: Particles RESTful endpoints - Particle data and related operations

tags.name: afes
tags.description: AFEs RESTful endpoints - AFE (Asf Forming Events) data and related operations

Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: Enter your bearer token as: Bearer <token>

get.description: Get a specific volcano by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the volcano to retrieve (volc_num)

get.description: Get a list of volcanoes with optional filtering by any volcano field

parameters.name: volc_num
parameters.description: Filter by volcano number (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_name
parameters.description: Filter by volcano name (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_country
parameters.description: Filter by volcano country (exact match)

parameters.name: tectonic_settings
parameters.description: Filter by tectonic setting (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_rtype
parameters.description: Filter by rock type (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_type
parameters.description: Filter by volcano type (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_status
parameters.description: Filter by volcano status (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_loc
parameters.description: Filter by location details (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_subreg
parameters.description: Filter by subregion (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_slat
parameters.description: Filter by latitude (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_slon
parameters.description: Filter by longitude (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_selev
parameters.description: Filter by elevation (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_last_eruption
parameters.description: Filter by volcano last eruption (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: volc_mcont
parameters.description: Filter by volcanic group region (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: imgURL
parameters.description: Filter by image URL (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: data_source
parameters.description: Filter by data source (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: include_stats
parameters.description: Include statistics in the response

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-1000, default: 100)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (default: 1)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip (alternative to page parameter)

200.description: List of volcanoes matching the criteria

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the eruption to retrieve (ed_num)

get.description: Get a list of eruptions with optional filtering by any eruption field

parameters.name: ed_num
parameters.description: Filter by eruption number (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_num
parameters.description: Filter eruptions by volcano ID (exact match)

parameters.name: volc_name

parameters.name: id

parameters.name: sample_date

parameters.description: Filter by sample longitude (exact match)

parameters.description: Filter by whether sample is natural (true) or experimental (false)

parameters.description: Filter by sample technique (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: sample_surf
parameters.description: Filter by sample surface (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: sample_collector
parameters.description: Filter by sample collector (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: lab_procedure
parameters.description: Filter by laboratory procedure (exact match within array)

parameters.description: Filter by temperature lower bound (exact match)

parameters.name: oxygen_fugacity

parameters.name: experiment_duration
parameters.description: Filter by experiment duration (exact match)

parameters.description: Include statistics in the response

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-1000, default: 100)

parameters.description: Number of items to skip (alternative to page parameter)

parameters.description: The ID of the particle to retrieve (imgURL)

get.description: Get a list of particles with optional filtering by any particle field

parameters.name: imgURL
parameters.description: Filter particles by image URL (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: sample_code

parameters.name: volc_num

parameters.name: volc_name
parameters.description: Filter particles by volcano name (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.description: Filter particles by main type (particles with >0% of this type)

parameters.name: aspect_rat
